title: Firefox 153 Available With Support For Vulkan Video Decoding, Experimental JPEG-XL
byline: Written by Michael Larabel in Mozilla on 20 July 2026 at 07:32 AM EDT. 18 Comments
excerpt: Mozilla has uploaded the Firefox 153.0 release binaries today for the newest monthly update to this cross-platform web browser
content_html:
Mozilla has uploaded the Firefox 153.0 release binaries today for the newest monthly update to this cross-platform web browser. Making Firefox 153 exciting is that it's the newest Extended Support Release "ESR" as well as introducing Vulkan Video decode support.

Firefox 153 is the newest ESR release designed for enterprises, schools, and other organization for long-term stability.

On the feature side, Firefox 153 introduces Vulkan Video decoding support. Firefox on Linux to date has focused on the Video Acceleration API (VA-API) that works well for some vendors but lacks official support from NVIDIA unless using the independent NVIDIA-VAAPI driver project that layers VA-API on NVDEC. There are also various embedded drivers and more not supporting VA-API. Now with Firefox there is initial Vulkan Video decode support for that modern, cross-vendor and cross-platform video acceleration interface.

Firefox 153 also brings a number of PDF enhancements, continued enablement around JPEG-XL, HDR video playback on Windows, and more.

Within the Firefox Labs area is where the experimental support for the JPEG-XL image format can be enabled. More details within the beta release notes.

Firefox 153 release binaries can be downloaded from ftp.mozilla.org.

Within the Firefox Labs area is where the experimental support for the JPEG-XL image format can be enabled. More details within the beta release notes. Firefox 153 release binaries can be downloaded from ftp.mozilla.org.

content_html_zh:
Mozilla 今天上传了 Firefox 153.0 版本二进制文件，以对该跨平台网络浏览器进行最新的每月更新。 使 Firefox 153 令人兴奋的是它是最新的扩展支持版本“ESR”以及引入了 Vulkan 视频解码支持。

Firefox 153 是最新的 ESR 版本，专为企业、学校和其他组织提供长期稳定性而设计。

在功能方面，Firefox 153引入了Vulkan视频解码支持。 迄今为止，Linux 上的 Firefox 一直专注于视频加速 API (VA-API)，该 API 对于某些供应商来说效果很好，但缺乏 NVIDIA 的官方支持，除非使用在 NVDEC 上分层 VA-API 的独立 NVIDIA-VAAPI 驱动程序项目。 还有各种嵌入式驱动程序以及更多不支持 VA-API 的驱动程序。 现在，Firefox 为现代、跨供应商和跨平台视频加速接口提供了初始 Vulkan 视频解码支持。

Firefox 153 还带来了许多 PDF 增强功能、围绕 JPEG-XL 的持续支持、Windows 上的 HDR 视频播放等。

在 Firefox Labs 区域内可以启用对 JPEG-XL 图像格式的实验性支持。 测试版发行说明中有更多详细信息。

Firefox 153 版本二进制文件可以从 ftp.mozilla.org 下载。
